query:
SELECT v.project_id   AS "project_id!: Uuid",
               a.can_view      AS "can_view?: bool",
               a.can_edit      AS "can_edit?: bool"
        FROM   vault_items v
        LEFT JOIN vault_access a
               ON a.vault_item_id = v.id AND a.user_id = $2
        WHERE  v.id = $1 AND v.deleted_at IS NULL
